summary: Completed comprehensive testing of personalized CV correlation features. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Observatoire personalized card, Evolution exposure card with CV warning, and Learning modules page.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

test_credentials: Test accounts created dynamically with unique pseudos during testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personalized CV correlation features fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/observatoire/personalized, /api/evolution-index/user-profile, /api/learning. Frontend: ObservatoireView with PersonalizedObservatoireCard, EvolutionIndexView with EvolutionExposureCard, ParticulierView with LearningCard relevance badges. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

backend_apis: GET /api/observatoire/personalized?token= - returns has_cv=false when no CV analyzed, returns personalized data with matches/skill_gaps/declining_alerts/sector_relevance when CV exists
GET /api/observatoire/dashboard - still works and returns global data
GET /api/evolution-index/user-profile?token= - returns enriched data with has_cv, data_sources, emerging_from_cv, recommended_trainings, recommended_skills_to_acquire
GET /api/learning?token= - returns modules with relevance, relevance_score, gaps_addressed fields
frontend_flows: Observatoire page shows 'Personnalisez votre observatoire' card when no CV is analyzed (data-testid='observatoire-no-cv')
Observatoire page shows observatoire indicators and tabs
Evolution page shows 'Votre exposition aux transformations' card with score (data-testid='evolution-exposure-card')
Evolution page shows 'Analysez votre CV pour une évaluation personnalisée' warning when no CV
Evolution page shows 'Formations recommandées' section with training recommendations
Evolution page shows 'À acquérir' section with recommended skills
Formations page shows learning cards with category badges
LearningCard shows 'Recommandé pour vous' badge when relevance is 'haute' (data-testid='relevance-badge-high')

personalized_observatoire_no_cv.message: Analysez votre CV pour obtenir des recommandations personnalisées

learning_modules_relevance.gaps_addressed: list of skill gaps the module addresses
learning_modules_relevance.note: Without CV data, all modules have 'basse' relevance - this is expected behavior

/api/observatoire/personalized.matches: array of {user_skill, observatory_skill, status, emergence_score, growth_rate, related_sectors, related_jobs}
/api/observatoire/personalized.skill_gaps: array of {skill_name, emergence_score, growth_rate, status, related_sectors, sector_relevant, priority}
/api/observatoire/personalized.sector_relevance: array of {sector, transformation_index, hiring_trend, your_emerging_skills, your_stable_skills, your_declining_skills, skill_gap_alert}
/api/observatoire/personalized.emerging_from_cv: array of {name, category, score, level, sectors, jobs, trend}

/api/evolution-index/user-profile.exposure_interpretation: object with level, label, description, color, recommendation
/api/evolution-index/user-profile.data_sources: object with profile, passport, cv_analysis booleans

/api/learning.modules: array with additional fields: relevance, relevance_score, gaps_addressed
